1001.name: Rusty Shortsword
1001.description: A battered shortsword with a chipped blade. It's seen better days, but it's still sharp enough to cut.

1002.name: The Silver Key
1002.description: A heavy silver key bearing the royal crest. It feels important.

1003.name: Tapestry Fragment (East)
1003.description: A torn piece of cloth depicting a rising sun. Part of a larger tapestry.

1004.name: Tapestry Fragment (North)
1004.description: A torn piece of cloth depicting a shining star. Part of a larger tapestry.

1005.name: Tapestry Fragment (South)
1005.description: A torn piece of cloth depicting a flowing river. Part of a larger tapestry.

1006.name: Knight's Broadsword
1006.description: A sturdy steel blade etched with faded runes. Heavy but reliable.

1007.name: Rusted Chainmail
1007.description: Old but functional armor. The links are corroded but still hold together.

1008.name: Crown of Embers
1008.description: A crown that radiates heat. Taken from the Usurper Wraith. It whispers of power.

1009.name: Shadow Essence
1009.description: A vial of condensed darkness. It writhes inside the glass like a living thing.

1010.name: Venom Sac
1010.description: A bulbous sac of spider venom. Handle with extreme care.

1011.name: Healing Draught
1011.description: A small glass vial filled with a warm amber liquid. It smells of honey and herbs.

1012.name: Greater Healing Draught
1012.description: A larger vial of potent healing liquid. The amber glow is intense.

2001.name: Severed Cyber-Eye
2001.description: A high-end optical implant, recently removed. The iris still dilates when light hits it.

2002.name: Power Cell
2002.description: A glowing blue energy source. It hums with stored potential.

2003.name: Encrypted Keycard
2003.description: A black keycard with corporate markings. Opens the Data Exchange elevator.

2004.name: Kevlar Vest
2004.description: Standard issue corporate security armor. Lightweight but effective.

2005.name: Hacker's Neural Interface
2005.description: A headpiece that boosts processing speed. Tingles when worn.

2006.name: Charged Cyber-Eye
2006.description: A cyber-eye powered by a glowing cell. It looks ready to scan. Use it on the retinal scanner.

2007.name: Monomolecular Blade
2007.description: A sword with an edge one molecule thick. It cuts through anything.

2008.name: Stim Pack
2008.description: A single-use injector filled with combat stimulants. Heals wounds rapidly.

2009.name: Military-Grade Stim
2009.description: A high-end combat medical injector. Corporate issue — not available to civilians.
